description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named centos_gcc that runs in the default test stage on a CentOS runner (no specific Docker image). The job should execute the following shell commands in order: source ~/prepare_build_gcc.sh, mkdir build, cd build, and cmake -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=gcc -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=g++ .. . Assign the runner tags gcc and centos to the job. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are required.
